patient_summary: Olivia, female, age 73. Active problems documented include Mixed dyslipidemia, Essential hypertension, Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus, postoperative/unspecified anemia, and leg pain. Major recent procedure: COLONOSCOPY, WITH BIOPSY (02/21/2025, Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Key laboratory findings (07/03/2023): Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; Iron 41 (L) ug/dL; Iron Saturation 15 (L) %; eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2; Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL; LDL Calculated 62 mg/dL; TSH Ultra Sensitive 1.320 mIU/mL. Multiple care teams are documented including Hand Hoyet A, MD (PCP) and several Piedmont specialists. Note: demographic conflicts present in the record (DOB and legal sex) and variable smoking history across sources; these conflicts are preserved in the consolidated record.
